name: Scentre Group
analysis: SCG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$3.8500, stop A$3.6036, target A$4.5892 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
